provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture, visible brushstrokes, architectural interior or exterior, smooth elliptical alien space station surrounded by a cloud of small broker pods and shuttle traffic — teal matte hull with chrome sensor nodes bristling from every surface, oversized engine nacelles, dozens of small trading vessels clustered around the main hull like pilot fish around a whale, holographic drift-pattern identifiers shifting on the hull surface, the mobile marketplace of space traders
